[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 10011011 5
3 00000001 1
4 01001000 2
5 00000001 1
6 00000000 a
7 00110000 2
